Index.meta_title: H&T AI TECH — AI & Software for Real Operations
Index.meta_description: H&T AI TECH designs and delivers AI systems, custom software, and engineering teams for enterprises and smart-city programs in Vietnam and beyond.

Hero.title: Build AI that holds up in real operations
Hero.description: We help companies and cities turn ideas into working software — computer vision, machine learning, and dedicated engineering teams based in Da Nang.

HomeServices.title: Ways we partner with you
HomeServices.description: Whether you need specialists on your team or a full build from H&T, we keep scope clear and delivery accountable.

DeliveryProof.title: Quality gates we use on every AI release
DeliveryProof.item1_description: We document decisions, data paths, and failure cases before choosing models or writing production code.
DeliveryProof.item2_description: Accuracy, latency, and acceptance criteria are agreed up front so progress is measurable.
DeliveryProof.item3_description: Permissions, human review, logging, and fallbacks are part of the launch plan — not extras.
DeliveryProof.item4_description: We track reliability, cost, and usage so improvements stay grounded in real performance.

CTA.title: Tell us what you want to build
CTA.description: Share your goals, timeline, and constraints. We will recommend a team, a product sprint, or a discovery workshop.

HeroService.title: AI, software, and teams for ambitious products
HeroService.description: From staffed engineering squads to computer vision platforms and cloud foundations — choose the engagement that fits your roadmap.

HowweworkService.title: A practical path from kickoff to first release
HowweworkService.description: We start with clarity, staff the right specialists, and expand only when delivery is already working.

ServicesCatalog.hire_description: Place experienced developers, AI specialists, and QA into your existing workflow with clear ownership.
ServicesCatalog.product_description: Take a concept or pilot and turn it into software your users and operators can rely on every day.
ServicesCatalog.agentic_description: Design agent workflows with tool use, review steps, and monitoring for real business processes.
ServicesCatalog.cloud_description: Strengthen infrastructure, data pipelines, and deployment practices so AI workloads stay stable.
ServicesCatalog.data_description: Build retrieval, pipelines, and reporting layers that keep models connected to trustworthy data.
ServicesCatalog.ux_description: Create dashboards, review screens, and operator tools that make AI outputs easy to trust and act on.
ServicesCatalog.vision_description: Deploy detection and inspection models for safety, logistics, and smart-city monitoring.
ServicesCatalog.ml_description: Train, evaluate, and operate models tailored to your domain — with handover your team can maintain.

Products.title: Products from H&T AI TECH
Products.description: Software and AI systems we design, ship, and support — from smart-city vision to consumer apps.
Products.building_title: What our product teams are building now
Products.building_description: Active initiatives with concrete next steps — so you can see where H&T is investing today.
Products.p1_description: Detects helmets and heads on construction sites with YOLOv8 — about 92% accuracy in live video streams.
Products.p2_description: Finds container damage with computer vision and 3D scanning — faster inspections and automated reports.
Products.p3_description: Flags traffic violations in real time using models trained on Vietnamese road data and multi-camera setups.
Products.p4_description: A cross-platform game with strong AI opponents, 5-in-a-row mode, and multiplayer on iOS and Android.
Products.b1_description: An AI-assisted platform for traffic-law practice with scoring, feedback, and mobile learning materials.
Products.b1_next: More scenario packs and richer AI scoring
Products.b2_description: Combining helmet, container, and traffic models into one deployable vision stack with shared monitoring.
Products.b2_next: Shared model registry and operator dashboards
Products.b3_description: Agent-assisted review for inspections and violation triage, with human approval before actions go out.
Products.b3_next: Field pilot and stronger safety checks

Approach.step1_body: We align on goals, users, data sources, constraints, and what success should look like for the first release.
Approach.step2_body: You meet specialists matched to the work — AI, backend, cloud, or product engineering — before kickoff.
Approach.step3_body: Access, architecture review, delivery rhythm, and an early working slice that proves direction.
Approach.step4_body: We add people or scope when results justify it — not because a plan says the team must get larger.
Approach.why_title: What you can expect when we work together
Approach.why1_body: AI, vision, and full-stack engineers with experience taking systems from prototype to live use.
Approach.why2_body: Direct access to senior leads, written plans, and progress you can review every sprint.
Approach.why3_body: A Da Nang team with strong English, competitive rates, and overlap for regional and global clients.
Approach.faq1_q: Do you only provide temporary staff?
Approach.faq1_a: No. We can extend your team, but we prefer engagements where H&T owns architecture, AI integration, and delivery quality together with you.
Approach.faq2_q: How quickly can a project start?
Approach.faq2_a: Intro conversations can happen within a few days. Start dates depend on role fit, security onboarding, and specialist availability.
Approach.faq3_q: Will your engineers join our tools and meetings?
Approach.faq3_a: Yes. We work in your repositories, standups, and review process with clear ownership from H&T AI TECH.
Approach.faq4_q: What if we need a fixed-scope product instead of a team?
Approach.faq4_a: We can run a scoped product build, a discovery workshop, or advise if the idea is not ready yet.

TeamShapes.title: Specialists matched to the work you need done
TeamShapes.description: We staff around the problem — vision systems, data platforms, product interfaces, or full product ownership — instead of a generic roster.
TeamShapes.item1_body: Workflows that call tools, request human review, and stay observable in production.
TeamShapes.item2_body: Pipelines, permissions, retrieval, and reporting that keep models connected to real data.
TeamShapes.item3_body: Dashboards, review screens, and operator tools that make AI outputs actionable.

AboutPage.title: An AI company built for real-world systems
AboutPage.description: H&T AI TECH is a Da Nang–based team that designs computer vision, machine learning, and custom software for enterprises and public programs. We care about systems that stay useful after launch.
AboutPage.p1_description: We take responsibility for architecture, AI quality, and release outcomes — not just hours billed.
AboutPage.p2_description: Accuracy, latency, and acceptance criteria are agreed early so progress stays visible.
AboutPage.p3_description: Our engineers join your tools and rituals with clear ownership from H&T AI TECH.
AboutPage.p4_description: We expand scope or headcount when results justify it, not by default.

tai.name: Dr. Nguyen Huu Tai
tai.role: Founder · CEO · Head of AI & IoT
tai.bio: Leads AI and IoT innovation across intelligent systems, computer vision, and smart-city automation.

chien.name: Dr. Le Quang Chien
chien.bio: Leads the AI team on enterprise automation and applied AI systems in Vietnam.

minh.name: Dr. Le Quang Minh
minh.bio: Leads Japan-market growth for AI-powered business initiatives. Speaks Vietnamese, English, and Japanese.

tam.name: Nguyen Viet Tam, MBA
tam.bio: 15+ years in accounting, taxation, and business law across major Vietnamese enterprises.

hoan.name: Dr. Dau Manh Hoan
hoan.bio: PhD in Computer Science and Technology (China). Expertise in data analysis and mining, AI, and digital transformation. Focuses on digital transformation in education and training, and advises enterprises on digital technology, AI, big data, IoT, and automation to optimize management, improve operations, and drive innovation.

AboutPage.cta_description: Tell us about your product, operations challenge, or hiring need. We will suggest a practical next step.

ContactPage.title: Let's discuss your next project
ContactPage.description: Share your goals, timeline, and constraints. We will help you choose a team engagement, a product build, or a short discovery workshop.

WorkPage.title: AI systems for cities, logistics, and everyday products
WorkPage.description: Explore computer vision deployments, training platforms, and consumer apps built by H&T AI TECH — with metrics from real operating conditions.
WorkPage.cases_description: Vision and product systems trained for real sites, roads, and devices — with accuracy and performance you can review.
WorkPage.cta_title: Want something similar for your organization?
WorkPage.cta_description: We can adapt these systems for your sites, cities, or product roadmap.

Footer.blurb: H&T AI TECH builds applied AI, computer vision, and custom software for enterprises and smart-city programs from Da Nang, Vietnam.
